_meta.source_policy: PDF-derived learning content; story structure and characters are model_inference.

spoiler_policy: Hidden motivations and exact payoff scenes are sealed.

rivals.name: Natsuki Shindou
rivals.visual_motif: white blazer, gold pin, ruler-straight silver hair
rivals.strength: fast symbolic manipulation and clean operator algebra
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: carries the pride of a school expected to win with flawless proofs
rivals.signature_phrase: State the space before you state the answer.

rivals.name: Mio Kurokawa
rivals.visual_motif: black cardigan, teal notebook tabs, sleepy eyes
rivals.strength: finds hidden assumptions and approximation leaks
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: wants her team's questions to be treated as contributions, not obstruction
rivals.relationship_to_protagonist_team: sharp cross-examiner who respects Haru's refusal to bluff

rivals.name: Touko Hoshimi
rivals.visual_motif: rolled sleeves, safety goggles on head, orange ribbon
rivals.strength: connects equations to apparatus, timing, loss, and readout
rivals.weakness: can distrust clean abstraction too much
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: believes every implementation claim must survive the lab bench
rivals.relationship_to_protagonist_team: friendly rival who pressures Rikka to explain physically
rivals.signature_phrase: Show me where the photon can leak.

rivals.name: Yui Amano
rivals.visual_motif: simple uniform, star hairpin, carefully mended book bag
rivals.strength: connects distant chapters and translates ideas for teammates
rivals.weakness: hesitates when the room rewards speed over synthesis
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: wants a small school to be seen as thoughtful, not merely lucky
rivals.signature_phrase: A good answer should bring everyone with it.
